ping.title: 📡 Telemetry Response
session.unapproved: This outpost is not yet cleared for operations. Request authorization from the fleet commander {{if .Owner}}<@{{.Owner}}> {{end}}before proceeding.
session.denied: Access denied: your clearance does not authorize /{{.Command}}. Petition a station officer to grant your rank access.
permissions.panel.header:
**Clearance Console** — page {{.Page}}/{{.Pages}}
Assign the roles cleared for each command. Changes take effect at once.
permissions.command.contracts.use: Pledge, haul & release on contract postings
permissions.panel.empty: No commands to govern at this outpost.
settings.panel.header:
**Outpost configuration**
Protocol: **{{.Theme}}** · Comms: **{{.Language}}**
Select a value below; changes take effect at once.
settings.section.forum.label: **Contracts board** — where new contracts are filed for the fleet.
settings.section.reports.label: **Share ledgers** — where completed contracts' payout ledgers are posted.
settings.section.factor.label: **Crew share** — {{.Factor}}% of a contract's credit bounty goes to the crew by default.
settings.section.factor.bad_value: The crew share must be a figure between 0 and 100 (up to two decimals).
settings.section.contracts_max_items.lab: **Manifest capacity** — a contract may list up to {{.Limit}} distinct goods.
settings.section.contracts_max_items.bad: The capacity must be a whole figure of 1 or more.
bases.error.no_member: Name the crew member whose outpost this is via the `member` option.
bases.error.bad_base: Select an outpost from the manifest suggestions.
bases.error.bad_equipment: Select an installation from the manifest suggestions.
bases.error.base_not_found: No such outpost on record, or it is outside your command.
bases.error.equipment_not_found: No such installation on that outpost.
bases.register.limit: Outpost quota reached ({{.Limit}}). Decommission one first.
bases.extractor.limit: This outpost already fields the maximum of {{.Limit}} extractors.
bases.production.limit: This outpost already fields the maximum of {{.Limit}} fabricators.
bases.list.title: 🛰️ Outpost Registry
bases.list.empty: No outposts match your survey parameters.
bases.list.expired: This survey has gone stale — run `/base list` to re-scan.
contracts.error.not_in_thread: Issue this order from within a contract dispatch thread.
contracts.error.item_not_found: That commodity is not on the manifest.
contracts.create.failed_forum: Couldn't post the contract — the contracts board is missing. A station officer should re-run `/contract forum`.
contracts.create.failed_perms: Couldn't open the dispatch thread — the bot lacks clearance on the contracts board.
contracts.item.exists: That commodity is already on the manifest.
contracts.reserve.over_cap: That exceeds the contract's outstanding quota for this commodity.
contracts.deliver.over_reserved: You cannot haul in more than you pledged.
contracts.release.below_delivered: You cannot withdraw what has already been hauled in.
contracts.embed.title: 📜 {{.Title}}
contracts.panel.pick_deliver: Choose a commodity to haul in…
contracts.panel.none_reserve: Nothing left to pledge on this contract.
contracts.panel.none_deliver: You have no pledges to haul in here.
contracts.panel.none_release: You have no pledges to withdraw here.
contracts.panel.expired: This manifest pick lapsed — tap the button again.
contracts.notify.closing_soon: 📢 {{.Mentions}} — this contract lapses in {{.Left}}. Haul in what you pledged before the window closes.
contracts.notify.closing_soon_done: 📢 This contract lapses in {{.Left}} — every pledge has been hauled in.
contracts.payout.header: 💰 **Crew shares** — {{.Pool}} credits ({{.Factor}}% of the bounty) split by the value each hauler brought in:
contracts.payout.remainder: Rounding dust left in the corp vault: {{.Amount}} credits.
contracts.payout.priceless: The ledgers price nothing for: {{.Items}} — those crates didn't weigh into the split.
contracts.payout.zero_value: The ledgers price none of this contract's cargo — the vault couldn't split the pool; divide it by hand.
contracts.console.home_unpublished_hint: ⚠️ Unposted contracts never reached the forum — usually a comms fault with Discord. Inspect one and tap 🔄 Repost to try again.
contracts.console.over_reserved: That's more than this hauler still has to deliver.
contracts.console.over_cap: That's more than the cargo line can still hold.
contracts.console.qty_below_reserved: The new quantity is below what haulers have already pledged.
contracts.console.republish_creating: Filing the contract — it'll appear on the board shortly.
contracts.console.bad_deadline: Set the window as whole numbers of days, hours, and minutes (leave all blank for an open-ended contract).
contracts.console.bad_item: Name a commodity and a positive quota.
contracts.console.no_forum: No contracts board is designated. A station officer must set it in `/settings` first.
contracts.console.max_items: The manifest already lists the maximum of {{.Limit}} commodities.
contracts.console.denied: You lack the writ for this action.
contracts.console.not_found: That contract is no longer on record.
contracts.console.item_not_found: That commodity is not on the manifest.
contracts.console.item_exists: A commodity by that name is already on the manifest.
contracts.console.below_delivered: You cannot void what has already been hauled in.
contracts.console.tpl_list_empty: The archive holds no matching charters.
contracts.console.payout_reprint_queued: The share ledger is queued — it will land in the reports channel shortly.
contracts.console.payout_already_paid: Those shares were already handed out.
contracts.console.payout_no_reports_chan: No share-ledger channel is set — designate one in /settings first.
contracts.console.tpl_no_items: The manifest is empty — add commodities below.
contracts.console.bad_reward: The bounty must be non-negative figures (credits may carry two decimals; the crew share between 0 and 100).
contracts.console.tpl_not_found: That charter is no longer on file.
contracts.console.tpl_exists: A charter under that title is already on file.
contracts.console.tpl_item_not_found: That commodity is not on this charter.
contracts.console.tpl_item_exists: That commodity is already on the charter.
contracts.console.search_hint: Give part of a name and submit — the registry offers its matches.
contracts.console.tpl_search_hint: Sifts the archive by title; leave blank for everything.
contracts.console.browse_empty: The registry lists nothing under this class.
contracts.console.item_excluded: The registry does not permit that item on a manifest.
supply.console.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
supply.console.not_found: That request was not found (it may have been removed).
supply.console.item_not_found: That item is not on the request.
supply.console.item_exists: That item is already on the request.
supply.console.no_reservation: You have no reservation on that item.
supply.console.below_delivered: You can't release below what you've already delivered.
supply.console.over_cap: That's more than the request still needs.
supply.console.qty_below_reserved: The new quantity can't be below what members have already reserved.
supply.console.max_items: A request can have at most {{.Limit}} items.
supply.console.limit_reached: You already have {{.Limit}} open requests. Close one first.
supply.console.no_forum: No supply forum is configured yet. An admin must set one in /settings.
supply.console.bad_planet: The planet must be a whole number of 1 or more (or left blank).
supply.console.bad_link: That isn't a valid message link from this server.
supply.console.bad_qty: Please enter a whole number greater than zero.
supply.console.close_mismatch: That didn't match the request title. The request was not closed.
supply.console.list_empty: You have no requests matching this filter.
supply.console.lbl_close_confirm: Type the request title to confirm
supply.console.search_hint: Type part of an item name, then submit to see matches.
supply.embed.title: {{.Title}}
supply.panel.none_reserve: There's nothing left to reserve on this request.
supply.panel.none_deliver: You have nothing to deliver here.
supply.panel.none_release: You have nothing to release here.
supply.panel.bad_qty: Please enter a whole number greater than zero.
supply.panel.expired: Please pick an item and try again.
supply.reserve.over_cap: That's more than the request still needs.
supply.deliver.completed: Delivered {{.Qty}}× {{.Item}} — the request is now complete! 🎉
supply.release.no_reservation: You have no reservation on that item.
supply.release.below_delivered: You can't release below what you've already delivered.
supply.create.failed_forum: Couldn't post your request: no supply forum is configured.
supply.create.failed_perms: Couldn't post your request: the bot lacks permission in the supply forum.
supply.error.item_not_found: That item is no longer on the request.
settings.section.supply_forum.label: **Supply forum** — where members' supply requests are posted.
settings.section.supply_limit.label: **Open-request limit** — each member may have up to {{.Limit}} open supply requests.
settings.section.supply_limit.bad_value: Enter a whole number between 1 and {{.Max}}.
